title: A Chef's Voyage
overview: Following Chef David Kinch and his team's journey from their 3 Michelin Star in California on a one of a kind "four hands" collaboration with three legendary chefs at their iconic restaurants in Paris, Provence and Marseille.

trailers.title: A Chef's Voyage, directed by: Rémi Anfosso, Doc Edge Festival 2020
